failedAssertions.reason: Backend product lock handlers not wired into main worker.ts entry point. The UI code (dist/ui/index.js) correctly queries product-locks via usePluginData and would display merge conflict indicators when locks exist, but the worker.js (dist/worker.js) is missing all product lock data and action handlers. Source files src/autopilot/helpers.ts and src/autopilot/worker.ts contain implementations (upsertProductLock, listProductLockEntities, acquireProductLock handler) but these are NOT imported or registered in the main worker.ts entry point. Specifically missing: (1) ctx.data.register for 'product-locks' data key, (2) ctx.actions.register for acquire-product-lock, (3) ctx.actions.register for release-product-lock, (4) ctx.actions.register for check-merge-conflict. Cannot test UI behavior without functional backend.

systemicBlockers.description: Product lock backend not integrated into main plugin worker. src/autopilot/helpers.ts has upsertProductLock, findProductLock, listProductLockEntities. src/autopilot/worker.ts has ctx.actions.register for acquireProductLock, releaseProductLock, checkMergeConflict. But worker.ts (entry point) does not import these functions or register these handlers.
systemicBlockers.requiredFix: Add to src/worker.ts imports from './autopilot/helpers.js': asProductLock, upsertProductLock, findProductLock, listProductLockEntities, findActiveProductLock, findProductLockForTarget. Add to src/worker.ts: (1) ctx.data.register for 'product-lock' and 'product-locks' data keys using upsertProductLock/listProductLockEntities/findProductLock, (2) ctx.actions.register for acquire-product-lock using the logic from autopilot/worker.ts, (3) ctx.actions.register for release-product-lock, (4) ctx.actions.register for check-merge-conflict. Then rebuild plugin with: cd packages/plugins/examples/plugin-autoresearch-improver && node ./esbuild.config.mjs

frictions.description: Product lock data key returns empty results because no data handler registered - this is a backend gap not a UI issue. The UI correctly shows nothing when no locks exist.

progressFromPriorRounds: Round 10 had 23 passed, 1 failed (VAL-AUTOPILOT-037, reported as missing UI). This round (11) investigated root cause: the UI code IS present in dist/ui/index.js with correct merge conflict/badge rendering logic, but the backend worker.js lacks the product lock data and action handlers. The autopilot sub-module (src/autopilot/worker.ts) has the implementations but they were never wired into the main worker.ts entry point. This is an integration gap, not a missing feature gap.
